name: Spotlight Mask
snippet: Move the cursor across this panel to reveal the spotlight mask. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
runtimeNotes: DOM: init(root) wires listeners/timers and returns { step?(t), stop() }; stop() releases everything for leak-free remounts. Perf budget — gpu: low, cpu: low, mobileSafe: true. Reduced motion: freeze.
